sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Alaska Air Group (ALK) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates
feed.summary: Alaska Air Group (ALK) reported Q4 earnings of $0.43 per share, significantly surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.11, despite being lower than the $0.97 per share from a year ago. The airline's revenues for the quarter were $3.63 billion, slightly missing the consensus estimate. The company currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), indicating an expected in-line performance with the market.

feed.title: UNIVEST FINANCIAL Corp Has $7.74 Million Stock Holdings in Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: UNIVEST FINANCIAL Corp reduced its stake in Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) by 6.0% in the third quarter, holding 150,062 shares valued at $7.74 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, with some increasing and others initiating new stakes in the financial services provider. Analyst ratings for Bank of America are predominantly "Buy" or "Moderate Buy," with an average target price of $59.74, despite some negative sentiment related to potential policy headline risks.

feed.title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Up 30%, Analyst Upgrades to Outperform with $546 Target
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals has seen a 30% increase, prompting RBC Capital analyst Brian Abrahams to upgrade its rating from Sector Perform to Outperform, with a raised price target of $546. This reflects optimism about the company's future growth and market performance. The article also touches upon Kimberly-Clark (KMB) analyst ratings, which show a more cautious outlook with several recent downgrades and lowered price targets.

feed.title: Alaska Air Group Reports 3% Revenue Growth to $3.63 Billion in Q4 FY2025
feed.summary: Alaska Air Group reported a 3% year-over-year revenue increase to $3.63 billion in Q4 FY2025, just

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Wealth Advisors Has $4.19 Million Stock Holdings in Abrdn Emerging Markets Equity Income Fund Inc $AEF
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Wealth Advisors decreased its stake in Abrdn Emerging Markets Equity Income Fund (AEF) by 34.9% in Q3, now holding 646,985 shares valued at $4.19 million, making it their fifth-largest holding. The fund recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.18, resulting in a 9.3% annualized yield. Institutional investors collectively own approximately 73.9% of AEF stock.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Sells SmartDose Rights To AbbVie And Refocuses Portfolio
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services has sold the manufacturing and supply rights for its SmartDose 3.5mL On Body Delivery System to AbbVie for $112.5 million plus potential milestone payments. This strategic move allows West to refocus its portfolio on other SmartDose configurations, larger volume systems, and platforms like the Synchrony S1 prefillable syringe, while strengthening its relationship with AbbVie. The deal, expected to close in mid-2026, involves a product that represented about 4% of West's 2025 revenue and aims to reframe West as a diversified partner in complex drug delivery.

feed.title: Northstar Asset Management Inc. Increases Stock Holdings in Verisk Analytics, Inc. $VRSK
feed.summary: Northstar Asset Management Inc. has increased its stake in Verisk Analytics, Inc. by 40.7% in the third quarter of 2025, now owning 27,805 shares valued at $6.99 million. This makes Verisk Analytics its 23rd largest holding, representing 1.8% of Northstar's portfolio. Despite mixed analyst ratings, Verisk reported strong Q3 EPS and increased revenue, and has issued a positive FY2025 EPS guidance, although its revenue slightly missed estimates.

feed.title: DiamondRock Hospitality Announces 2025 Tax Treatment for Distributions
feed.summary: DiamondRock Hospitality Company has announced its 2025 dividend distributions for common stock ($0.08 per share) and Series A preferred stock ($0.515625 per share), with scheduled dates to ensure timely returns. The company, a self-advised REIT owning 35 premium hotels, advises shareholders to consult tax advisors regarding specific tax treatments. Wall Street analysts have a moderate buy rating with an average 1-year price target of $9.97 for DRH.

feed.title: VICI Properties Inc. Announces Tax Treatment of 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) has announced the tax treatment for its 2025 distributions on common stock, providing a detailed table summarizing the distributions for the tax year ended December 31, 2025. The announcement includes specific breakdowns for ordinary dividends, qualified dividends, non-dividend distributions (return of capital), and Section 199A dividends, along with important notes regarding federal income tax treatment and holding period requirements for stockholders. Stockholders are advised to consult their tax advisors for personalized guidance.

feed.title: How to Buy Trueshares Structured Outcome (april) Etf (APRZ) ETF?
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive guide on how to buy the Trueshares Structured Outcome (april) Etf (APRZ) ETF, covering essential steps from choosing a broker and setting up an account to researching the ETF, deciding investment amounts, placing orders, and implementing risk management strategies. It outlines key financial indicators to consider and differentiates between various order types, emphasizing the importance of long-term monitoring and understanding market risks.

feed.title: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From M&T Bank's Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: M&T Bank's Q4 performance met revenue expectations but saw a stock decline, with management attributing results to loan growth, asset quality improvement, and cost control. This article highlights the top five analyst questions from the earnings call, covering capital ratios, non-commercial real estate loan growth, core deposit strategies, fee/expense growth accounting, and the balance between return on tangible common equity and overall growth. Going forward, StockStory will monitor loan growth, deposit gathering, and fee-based initiatives, along with regulatory and macroeconomic impacts.

feed.title: Here Are Friday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Applied Materials, e.l.f. Beauty, Fortinet, Freeport MacMoRan, Procter & Gamble, Spotify, and More
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts issued upgrades, downgrades, and new initiations for several major companies on Friday, January 23, 2026. Noteworthy upgrades included Applied Materials and Spotify, while Freeport-McMoRan and Sherwin-Williams saw downgrades. The market ended the week with futures trading lower after a two-day rally, with focus shifting to upcoming fourth-quarter earnings and economic data.

feed.title: Here's What Mizuho Securities Has to Say About ​Palo Alto Networks (PANW)
feed.summary: Mizuho Securities reiterated a Buy rating on Palo Alto Networks (PANW) with a $220 price target, following Guggenheim's upgrade to Neutral. Analysts believe PANW will maintain leadership in the cybersecurity sector, benefiting from AI-driven tailwinds and strong free-cash flow margins through 2028. The company is expected to see over 26.7% upside from current levels as it continues strategic acquisitions and provides essential security solutions.

feed.title: Equifax Introduces Enhanced Synthetic Identity Fraud Detection
feed.summary: Equifax has launched "Synthetic Identity Risk," a new fraud detection product that utilizes AI and machine learning to identify and prevent synthetic identity fraud, a rapidly growing threat in consumer lending. This solution analyzes identity data, credit history, and behavioral signals to help businesses proactively detect fraudulent activities and reduce significant financial losses, which average around $13,000 per synthetic identity. The product aims to enable lenders to shift from reactive loss recovery to proactive prevention, safeguarding both their finances and customer trust.

feed.title: Equifax uses AI to hunt fake borrowers costing lenders $13K each
feed.summary: Equifax has launched "Synthetic Identity Risk," an AI-powered fraud detection product designed to identify and prevent synthetic identity fraud. This new solution uses patent-pending machine learning to analyze identity data, credit history, and behavioral signals to detect fraud at account opening and continuously monitor portfolios. Equifax reports that synthetic identity fraud costs lenders an average of $13,000 per known case, highlighting the need for proactive prevention tools.

feed.title: iA Global Asset Management Inc. Has $12.44 Million Holdings in Republic Services, Inc. $RSG
feed.summary: iA Global Asset Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG) by 215.1% in the third quarter, now holding 54,200 shares valued at approximately $12.44 million. Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group, Geode Capital Management, and Norges Bank also hold substantial positions in RSG, with institutional ownership nearing 57.73%. Despite some analysts trimming price targets, the stock maintains a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $248.86.

feed.title: iA Global Asset Management Inc. Grows Stake in Monster Beverage Corporation $MNST
feed.summary: iA Global Asset Management Inc. increased its stake in Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST) by 9.4% in Q3, bringing its total holdings to 172,176 shares valued at $11.59 million. This comes as Monster Beverage reported stronger-than-expected Q3 earnings with $0.56 EPS and $2.20 billion in revenue, leading analysts to maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $76.62. Despite high institutional ownership, company insiders have recently sold over $20 million worth of shares.

feed.title: FY2026 Earnings Forecast for GIII Issued By KeyCorp
feed.summary: KeyCorp initiated its FY2026 earnings per share forecast for G-III Apparel Group (NASDAQ:GIII) at $2.87, assigning an "Overweight" rating and a $35 price target. This forecast aligns with G-III's own guidance of $2.80–$2.90 per share. The company recently reported Q4 earnings of $1.90 per share, surpassing consensus estimates, although revenue of $988.65 million fell short of expectations and decreased year-over-year.

feed.title: SLB stock rises on earnings. Struggles in key regions 'are behind us,' says CEO.
feed.summary: This article reports on SLB's stock rise following its latest earnings release. The CEO stated that challenges in key regions are now in the past, suggesting an optimistic outlook for the company's future performance. No further details about the earnings or specific regions were provided.

feed.title: iA Global Asset Management Inc. Has $12.72 Million Holdings in Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: iA Global Asset Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in Caterpillar Inc. during the third quarter, raising its holdings by 19,648.9% to 26,661 shares, valued at approximately $12.72 million. Caterpillar recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.51 per share. Despite some insider selling, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock, with an average price target of $633.35, driven partly by strategic partnerships like the one with Nvidia for generative AI.

feed.title: Worthington Steel stock price target raised to $47 by KeyBanc on KCO deal
feed.summary: KeyBanc has increased its price target for Worthington Steel Inc (NYSE:WS) to $47 from $41, maintaining an Overweight rating following the company's announcement to acquire Klöckner & Co. The acquisition, expected to close in late 2026, is seen by KeyBanc as a driver for long-term earnings potential, despite an initial rise in net debt. Worthington Steel recently reported strong Q2 2025 sales and aims to become the second-largest steel service center in North America with this $2.4 billion acquisition.

feed.title: Zacks Research Has Pessimistic View of MAA FY2025 Earnings
feed.summary: Zacks Research has slightly lowered its FY2025 EPS estimate for Mid-America Apartment Communities (NYSE:MAA) to $8.71, below the consensus. Despite an increased quarterly dividend, the stock's payout ratio is high, and analyst sentiment is mixed with an average "Hold" rating. Insiders have recently engaged in both selling and buying activity, and institutional ownership remains high.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE:WST) Stock Rating Upgraded by Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE:WST) from a "hold" to a "strong-buy" rating. The firm also provided updated earnings per share estimates for several quarters in 2025, 2026, and 2027. Other analysts have also recently commented on WST, with several issuing "buy" or "outperform" ratings and setting target prices between $285.00 and $390.00.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To Urban Edge Properties (UE) Expanding Undrawn US$950 Million Credit Capacity
feed.summary: Urban Edge Properties (UE) has secured US$950 million in new unsecured credit facilities, including a US$700 million revolving credit line and US$250 million in delayed-draw term loans. This move aims to enhance financial flexibility for growth and development, although the company still faces earnings pressure and tighter interest coverage. Investors will need to assess how this expanded credit capacity influences the company's investment narrative, especially given existing financial concerns and the potential for increased leverage.

feed.title: Microsoft Slumps Heading Into Earnings-Here's What Matters Most
feed.summary: Microsoft (MSFT) stock is in a "death cross" pattern, signaling bearish momentum ahead of its January 28th earnings report. Investors will be closely watching Azure growth, AI investments, and capital expenditures, while the recent pullback has made the stock's valuation more attractive. Despite concerns about an "AI bubble," Microsoft's diversification and leadership in AI suggest it remains a strong long-term holding.

feed.title: Wolverine World Wide (WWW) Downgraded by Argus Amid Revenue Conc
feed.summary: Argus has downgraded Wolverine World Wide (WWW) from Buy to Hold due to disappointing direct-to-consumer revenue performance in the third quarter, indicating persistent weakness in a crucial growth area. The stock is considered "fairly valued" at 13.5 times earnings, despite presenting a mixed financial picture with strong gross margins but declining revenue growth. Although the company faces sector-specific risks and high volatility, recent insider buying transactions reflect some confidence.

feed.title: Highlighting Strategic Progress in Fiscal Year 2026 at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: Cardinal Health's CEO, Jason Hollar, presented at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference, highlighting the company's strategic growth, financial milestones, and its focus on driving value in the healthcare ecosystem for fiscal year 2026. The company reported increased non-GAAP EPS guidance, with specialty revenues expected to surpass $50 billion and BioPharma Solutions projecting over 30% revenue growth. Hollar also introduced the ContinuCare™ Pathway program to simplify diabetes supply management and discussed how Cardinal Health is leveraging marketplace volume and demographic trends to meet growing healthcare needs.

feed.title: Celcuity Inc. (CELC) Stock Analysis: Exploring the Biotechnology Innovator’s Growth Potential
feed.summary: Celcuity Inc. (CELC) is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing targeted therapies for solid tumors, particularly hormone receptor-positive and HER2-negative advanced breast cancer, and metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer, with its lead drug candidate, Gedatolisib. Despite operating at a loss due to heavy R&D investments, the company holds a favorable view from analysts, indicating a bullish trend. Celcuity's strategic collaborations, like the one with Pfizer, and its proprietary CELsignia diagnostic platform suggest significant growth potential for risk-tolerant, long-term investors.

feed.title: Analog Devices Adds AI Veteran to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) announced that Susie Wee will retire from its board of directors on March 11, 2026. Concurrently, the company expanded its board to 11 members and appointed Yoky Matsuoka, an AI and robotics expert and Panasonic executive officer, as an independent director. This strategic addition is expected to bolster Analog Devices' expertise in AI, robotics, and healthcare technology as it integrates hardware, software, and AI solutions.

feed.title: Inside PepsiCo Inc.: How a 128-Year-Old Giant Is Re?Engineering Snacks, Soda and the Future of Food
feed.summary: PepsiCo Inc. is transforming itself from just a soda brand into a data-driven, sustainability-focused product machine that is reshaping the food and beverage industry. The company is strategically balancing indulgent products with healthier, "better-for-you" options, leveraging data for hyper-localized product launches, and integrating sustainability into its core product development and packaging. This reinvention allows PepsiCo to maintain its market dominance against rivals like Coca-Cola, Mondelez, and Nestlé by owning entire consumption occasions and adapting to evolving consumer preferences.

feed.title: Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP) Upgraded to "Strong-Buy" at Exane BNP Paribas
feed.summary: Exane BNP Paribas has upgraded Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP) from a "hold" to a "strong-buy" rating. This upgrade aligns with several other analysts who have recently given positive outlooks and increased price targets for the semiconductor company. Microchip Technology has also recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced the launch of a new 600V gate-driver family to expand its market reach.

feed.title: Sempra Energy (NYSE:SRE) Raised to Strong-Buy at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group upgraded Sempra Energy (NYSE:SRE) from a "hold" to a "strong-buy" rating. Several other analysts have also issued "buy" or "outperform" ratings, with the consensus being a "Moderate Buy" and an average target price of $95.83. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has seen some insider selling recently.

feed.title: Seagate: Outlandish Valuation With Little Upside (NASDAQ:STX)
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (STX) is currently trading at a 29x forward P/E, near historical highs, driven by AI-related HDD demand. However, its nearline production capacity is fully booked through 2026, limiting immediate earnings upside. The company is also experiencing decelerating revenue growth, and its current valuation is considered high compared to peers, with potential for future normalized datacenter spending.

feed.title: Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) Stock Rating Upgraded by Raymond James Financial
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial upgraded Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) from a "moderate buy" to a "strong-buy" rating. This upgrade aligns with several other analysts who have also issued positive research reports and increased price targets for the tech giant. The positive sentiment is driven by strategic AI wins, such as Apple using Google’s Gemini models, and the continued commercial expansion of Waymo’s robotaxi service.

feed.title: Analog Devices appoints tech innovator Yoky Matsuoka to board
feed.summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) has appointed Dr. Yoky Matsuoka, a technology innovator and executive officer at Panasonic Holdings, to its Board of Directors as an independent director, effective January 20, 2026. Matsuoka, recognized for her expertise in integrating hardware, software, and AI, previously held leadership roles at Google, Apple, and Quanttus. Her addition expands ADI's board to 11 members as the semiconductor company continues to strengthen its leadership and financial position, with recent positive analyst upgrades and a 23-year streak of dividend increases.

feed.title: Medtronic receives CE mark for Sphere-360 AFib treatment catheter
feed.summary: Medtronic announced its Affera Sphere-360 catheter has received CE Mark approval in Europe and has begun its U.S. Horizon 360 IDE pivotal trial. This device is an all-in-one mapping and single-shot pulsed field ablation (PFA) catheter designed to treat paroxysmal atrial fibrillation. The company also highlighted recent positive developments regarding its MiniMed 780G system and analyst upgrades.

feed.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO Position Cut by Quadrant Private Wealth Management LLC
feed.summary: Quadrant Private Wealth Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Cisco Systems, Inc. by 74.2% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 38,689 shares and retaining 13,436 shares valued at approximately $919,000. Despite this reduction and substantial insider selling totaling $81.4 million, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $85.86, and Cisco exceeded its Q1 earnings estimates and provided positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Coca Cola Femsa S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE:KOF) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Coca Cola Femsa S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE:KOF) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from six analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $104.67. Recent analyst reports show a mix of "hold" and "buy" recommendations, with some firms boosting price objectives. The company recently reported strong Q3 earnings, beating consensus estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Alaska Air Talks Up Demand, But Issues Cautious Profit Outlook
feed.summary: Alaska Air Group (NYSE: ALK) reported mixed Q4 FY25 results, with sales slightly missing estimates but adjusted EPS exceeding guidance. The company noted strong corporate travel and diverse revenue stream performance, alongside share repurchases. While predicting strong demand and unit revenues for Q1 FY26, Alaska Air issued a cautious outlook for fiscal 2026 adjusted EPS, with a wider range than consensus, and recently placed a massive fleet order with Boeing.

feed.title: Strs Ohio Sells 111,174 Shares of Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER
feed.summary: Strs Ohio reduced its stake in Uber Technologies by 9.3% in the third quarter, selling 111,174 shares and holding 1,087,611 shares worth $106.55 million. The article also details other institutional investor activity, recent analyst ratings, and insider trades, including sales by CFO Prashanth Mahendra-Rajah and General Counsel Tony West.

feed.title: Argus Upgrades Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) to Strong-Buy
feed.summary: Argus has upgraded Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) to a "strong-buy" rating, despite the company currently having an average "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $214.86. Cintas recently announced a $1.00 billion share repurchase program, indicating management's belief that shares are undervalued. The business services provider's stock opened at $193.07, has a market cap of $77.21 billion, and reported strong quarterly earnings and revenue, beating analysts' estimates.

feed.title: Will declining ATS revenues hinder Celestica's Q4 earnings?
feed.summary: This article from MSN discusses the potential impact of declining revenues in Celestica's Advanced Technology Solutions (ATS) segment on its upcoming Q4 earnings report. It raises the question of whether this decline will negatively affect the company's overall financial performance.

feed.title: Citigroup to lay off more employees in March - Reuters (C:NYSE)
feed.summary: Citigroup is expected to implement another round of layoffs in March as CEO Jane Fraser continues efforts to streamline the bank and boost returns. This move is part of the bank's broader strategy to improve its financial performance. The exact number of employees affected by the upcoming layoffs was not specified.

feed.title: Should You Hold AAR Corp. (AIR)?
feed.summary: The article discusses AAR Corp. (AIR) based on Fred Alger Management's "Alger Weatherbie Specialized Fund" fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. While the fund acknowledged AAR Corp.'s strong performance and healthy demand trends in its markets, it noted that the stock detracted from performance due to investor uncertainty following a CFO transition. Despite AAR Corp.'s potential, the fund suggests that certain AI stocks might offer greater upside and less downside risk.

feed.title: Sanofi plans amlitelimab dermatitis filing after new readout
feed.summary: Sanofi announced intentions to file regulatory submissions for its atopic dermatitis (AD) candidate, amlitelimab, following positive data from two additional Phase 3 trials, SHORE and COAST 2. These results confirm the potential of the anti-OX40L antibody, building on previous findings from COAST-1, despite COAST-2 failing one primary endpoint. While the drug offers a dosing advantage over Dupixent, investor enthusiasm remains tempered by questions about amlitelimab's commercial potential against the highly successful Dupixent.

feed.title: Form DEF 14A TransDigm Group INC For: Sep 30
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Inc. (TDG) has filed its definitive proxy statement (DEF 14A) for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, detailing strong financial results including an 11% increase in net sales and a 14% rise in EBITDA. The filing outlines executive compensation, which is heavily performance-based, and board transitions, including the appointment of Michael J. Lisman as CEO. Stockholders will vote on the election of ten director nominees, ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor, and a "Say-on-Pay" proposal at the annual meeting on March 5, 2026.

feed.title: Iron Mountain Incorporated Announces Tax Treatment of 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: Iron Mountain Incorporated has announced the tax treatment for all 2025 distributions on its common stock, providing a detailed breakdown for each quarterly payment. This information is crucial for shareholders to accurately complete their federal tax returns, especially for those holding shares in "street name" where the IRS Form 1099-DIV might only report gross distributions. The company advises shareholders to consult with a tax professional as federal, state, and local tax laws can vary.

feed.title: SLB Stock Rises on Earnings. Struggles in Key Regions ‘Are Behind Us,’ Says CEO.
feed.summary: SLB's stock rose after the oilfield service provider reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings and revenue. The CEO indicated that struggles in key regions are now in the past, with the company anticipating a gradual recovery in 2026.

feed.title: Strs Ohio Has $124 Million Position in Welltower Inc. $WELL
feed.summary: Strs Ohio decreased its stake in Welltower Inc. (NYSE: WELL) by 9.5% in the third quarter, reducing its holding to 696,058 shares valued at $123.996 million. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors like Norges Bank and State Street Corp significantly increased their positions in the real estate investment trust. Welltower reported strong third-quarter earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend, maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $204.80.

feed.title: New Wave Wealth Advisors LLC Acquires Shares of 8,061 Western Digital Corporation $WDC
feed.summary: New Wave Wealth Advisors LLC initiated a new position in Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) during the third quarter, purchasing 8,061 shares valued at approximately $968,000. This move is part of a broader trend of institutional investors and hedge funds increasing their stakes in the data storage provider, with several firms significantly boosting their holdings. Western Digital has also recently increased its quarterly dividend and reported strong financial results, beating analyst expectations for EPS and revenue.
